title: mimulus aurantiacus var. pubescens
intro: Mimulus aurantiacus var. pubescens, also known as the hairy monkey flower, is a variety of the monkey flower plant, native to the Pacific coastal region of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mimulus aurantiacus var. pubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
